This plant has been traditionally used for its health benefits, including treating wounds, inflammation, and infections, due to its antimicrobial and antiseptic properties. The bioactive constituents of Mesembryanthemum crystallinum include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and glycosides, which contribute to its medicinal properties.
